title: What happened during Jerry Silky Los Angeles Twitch stream? Inside the 107 mph reckless driving controversy
summary_full: Jerry “Silky” faced backlash after viewers claimed he drove over 107 mph during a March 1, 2026 Twitch stream in Los Angeles. Felix “xQc” Lengyel and Zack “Asmongold” Hoyt criticized the driving as dangerous. Silky denied the claims, saying he was only going 70 mph. His Twitch channel remains active with no suspension reported.
